name: Black-Box Comprehensive — 80 cases across 12 categories
description: Black-box correctness sweep generated 2026-05-16. Every case has ExpectedSql so the rigorous Execution-Accuracy (multiset) check runs. Categories: selection, count, aggregation, single-filter, multi-filter, date-filter, period-compare, group-by, top-N, join+project, anti-join, refusal. Latency budget set to 180s per case to accommodate local qwen2.5-coder:7b.

Scenarios.Question: show me all users
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName, u.Email, u.FirstName, u.LastName FROM AspNetUsers u

Scenarios.Question: list all tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: show me ticket TCK-2026-00121
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.Description FROM Tickets t WHERE t.TicketNumber = 'TCK-2026-00121' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: list all roles
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT r.Name FROM AspNetRoles r

Scenarios.Question: show all entities
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT e.Name FROM Entitys e

Scenarios.Question: list ticket statuses
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT s.Name FROM TicketStatuses s

Scenarios.Question: show ticket categories
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT c.Name FROM TicketCategories c

Scenarios.Question: how many tickets do we have
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: count the tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: how many users
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM AspNetUsers

Scenarios.Question: how many entities
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Entitys

Scenarios.Question: total ticket count
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: how many categories exist
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM TicketCategories

Scenarios.Question: count of distinct ticket sources
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM TicketSources

Scenarios.Question: average resolution time in hours
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT AVG(CAST(DATEDIFF(hour, CreatedAt, ResolvedAt) AS FLOAT)) AS AvgResolutionHours FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: what is the latest ticket created date
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT MAX(CreatedAt) AS LatestCreated FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: how many distinct users created tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CreatedByUserId) AS DistinctCreators FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: earliest ticket date
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT MIN(CreatedAt) AS EarliestCreated FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: count distinct categories that have tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CategoryId) AS DistinctCategories FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: average tickets per entity
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(*) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Entitys), 0) AS AvgTicketsPerEntity FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: sum of attachment counts across tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS TotalAttachments FROM TicketAttachments

Scenarios.Question: show me open tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: show me critical tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE p.Name = 'Critical' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets in hardware category
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketCategories c ON c.Id = t.CategoryId WHERE c.Name = 'Hardware' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets submitted via web portal
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketSources src ON src.Id = t.SourceId WHERE src.Name = 'Web Portal' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: resolved tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Resolved' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: low priority tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE p.Name = 'Low' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: users with test.com email
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName, u.Email FROM AspNetUsers u WHERE u.Email LIKE '%test.com%'

Scenarios.Question: open critical tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND p.Name = 'Critical' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: open tickets in hardware category
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId JOIN TicketCategories c ON c.Id = t.CategoryId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND c.Name = 'Hardware' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: high priority open tickets from web portal
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId JOIN TicketSources src ON src.Id = t.SourceId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND p.Name = 'High' AND src.Name = 'Web Portal' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: critical tickets in network category
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId JOIN TicketCategories c ON c.Id = t.CategoryId WHERE p.Name = 'Critical' AND c.Name = 'Network' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets from email source with high priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketSources src ON src.Id = t.SourceId JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE src.Name = 'Email' AND p.Name = 'High' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: resolved hardware tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId JOIN TicketCategories c ON c.Id = t.CategoryId WHERE s.Name = 'Resolved' AND c.Name = 'Hardware' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: open low priority tickets in performance category
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId JOIN TicketCategories c ON c.Id = t.CategoryId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND p.Name = 'Low' AND c.Name = 'Performance' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets created today
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t WHERE CAST(t.CreatedAt AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets created this week
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t WHERE t.CreatedAt >= DATEADD(day, -DATEPART(weekday, GETDATE()) + 1, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets created last month
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t WHERE YEAR(t.CreatedAt) = YEAR(DATEADD(month, -1, GETDATE())) AND MONTH(t.CreatedAt) = MONTH(DATEADD(month, -1, GETDATE())) AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets created yesterday
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t WHERE CAST(t.CreatedAt AS DATE) = CAST(DATEADD(day, -1, GETDATE()) AS DATE) AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets created in May 2026
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t WHERE YEAR(t.CreatedAt) = 2026 AND MONTH(t.CreatedAt) = 5 AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets resolved in the last 7 days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t WHERE t.ResolvedAt >= DATEADD(day, -7, GETDATE()) AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets created in the last 30 days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t WHERE t.CreatedAt >= DATEADD(day, -30, GETDATE()) AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: compare ticket counts this month vs last month
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT 'ThisMonth' AS Period, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets WHERE YEAR(CreatedAt) = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND MONTH(CreatedAt) = MONTH(GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'LastMonth', COUNT(*) FROM Tickets WHERE YEAR(CreatedAt) = YEAR(DATEADD(month, -1, GETDATE())) AND MONTH(CreatedAt) = MONTH(DATEADD(month, -1, GETDATE())) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: compare open ticket counts this week vs last week
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT 'ThisWeek' AS Period, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.CreatedAt >= DATEADD(day, -DATEPART(weekday, GETDATE()) + 1, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) AND t.IsDeleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'LastWeek', COUNT(*) FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.CreatedAt >= DATEADD(day, -DATEPART(weekday, GETDATE()) - 6, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) AND t.CreatedAt < DATEADD(day, -DATEPART(weekday, GETDATE()) + 1, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: compare resolved tickets in March vs April
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT 'March' AS Period, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Resolved' AND MONTH(t.CreatedAt) = 3 AND t.IsDeleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'April', COUNT(*) FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Resolved' AND MONTH(t.CreatedAt) = 4 AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets created today vs yesterday
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT 'Today' AS Period, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets WHERE CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AND IsDeleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Yesterday', COUNT(*) FROM Tickets WHERE CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) = CAST(DATEADD(day, -1, GETDATE()) AS DATE) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: ticket counts last 30 days vs previous 30 days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT 'Last30' AS Period, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(day, -30, GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'Previous30', COUNT(*) FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(day, -60, GETDATE()) AND CreatedAt < DATEADD(day, -30, GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: show me ticket counts by status
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT s.Name AS Status, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY s.Name ORDER BY Total DESC

Scenarios.Question: tickets by priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT p.Name AS Priority, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY p.Name ORDER BY Total DESC

Scenarios.Question: tickets by category
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT c.Name AS Category, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketCategories c ON c.Id = t.CategoryId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY c.Name ORDER BY Total DESC

Scenarios.Question: tickets per entity
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT e.Name AS Entity, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets t JOIN Entitys e ON e.Id = t.EntityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY e.Name ORDER BY Total DESC

Scenarios.Question: ticket counts grouped by source
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT src.Name AS Source, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketSources src ON src.Id = t.SourceId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY src.Name ORDER BY Total DESC

Scenarios.Question: tickets by status and priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT s.Name AS Status, p.Name AS Priority, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY s.Name, p.Name

Scenarios.Question: show daily ticket creation count for the last 14 days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) AS Day, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(day, -14, GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) ORDER BY Day

Scenarios.Question: top 5 users by tickets created
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 u.UserName, COUNT(*) AS Tickets FROM Tickets t JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.CreatedByUserId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY u.UserName ORDER BY Tickets DESC

Scenarios.Question: top 3 categories by ticket count
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 3 c.Name AS Category, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketCategories c ON c.Id = t.CategoryId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY c.Name ORDER BY Total DESC

Scenarios.Question: oldest 3 open tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 3 t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.CreatedAt FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY t.CreatedAt ASC

Scenarios.Question: 10 most recent tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 10 t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.CreatedAt FROM Tickets t WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY t.CreatedAt DESC

Scenarios.Question: top 5 entities by ticket volume
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 e.Name AS Entity, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets t JOIN Entitys e ON e.Id = t.EntityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY e.Name ORDER BY Total DESC

Scenarios.Question: 5 tickets with longest resolution time
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 t.TicketNumber, t.Title, DATEDIFF(hour, t.CreatedAt, t.ResolvedAt) AS HoursToResolve FROM Tickets t WHERE t.ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND t.IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY HoursToResolve DESC

Scenarios.Question: show tickets with their status name
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title, s.Name AS Status FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: show tickets with their category and priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title, c.Name AS Category, p.Name AS Priority FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketCategories c ON c.Id = t.CategoryId JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: list users with their entity name
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName, e.Name AS Entity FROM AspNetUsers u LEFT JOIN Entitys e ON e.Id = u.EntityId

Scenarios.Question: show tickets with their assignee name
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title, u.UserName AS Assignee FROM Tickets t LEFT JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.AssignedToUserId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: show tickets with their creator email
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title, u.Email AS CreatorEmail FROM Tickets t JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.CreatedByUserId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: show tickets with status priority category and source
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, s.Name AS Status, p.Name AS Priority, c.Name AS Category, src.Name AS Source FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId JOIN TicketCategories c ON c.Id = t.CategoryId JOIN TicketSources src ON src.Id = t.SourceId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: list users with their role names
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName, r.Name AS Role FROM AspNetUsers u JOIN AspNetUserRoles ur ON ur.UserId = u.Id JOIN AspNetRoles r ON r.Id = ur.RoleId

Scenarios.Question: users with no tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName, u.Email FROM AspNetUsers u WHERE u.Id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT CreatedByUserId FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0)

Scenarios.Question: tickets without comments
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t WHERE t.Id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT TicketId FROM TicketComments) AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: entities with no tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT e.Name FROM Entitys e WHERE e.Id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT EntityId FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0)

Scenarios.Question: users with no assigned tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName, u.Email FROM AspNetUsers u WHERE u.Id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT AssignedToUserId FROM Tickets WHERE AssignedToUserId IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0)

Scenarios.Question: categories with no tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT c.Name FROM TicketCategories c WHERE c.Id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT CategoryId FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0)

Scenarios.Question: tickets without attachments
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t WHERE t.Id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT TicketId FROM TicketAttachments) AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: show me users with their password hash
insert a new user with name test
create a new role called administrator
remove all tickets from the system
